tech_news.title: Nintendo announces Switch 2 price increase, going into effect worldwide - Nintendo Everything
tech_news.description: Nintendo is increasing the price of Switch 2 worldwide, the company has announced. In the U.S. and Canada, the system is going up by $50. Europe will essentially see the console rise by €30. Over in Japan, Nintendo Switch 2 will increase by 10,000 yen, and th…

tech_news.title: Resident Evil Requiem update live, adds Leon Must Die Forever mini-game - Nintendo Everything
tech_news.description: The much-discussed mini-game for Resident Evil Requiem has just been made available as part of a new update for the game, which is revealed to be Leon Must Die Forever. Nintendo Switch 2 players can access it now. The mode can be unlocked after finishing the …

tech_news.title: Anthropic introduces "dreaming," a system that lets AI agents learn from their own mistakes - VentureBeat
tech_news.description: Anthropic has launched “dreaming” for AI agents, giving Claude new self-improving tools designed to boost enterprise automation, reliability, and scale.

tech_news.title: Dirty Frag Vulnerability Made Public Early: Root Privilege On All Distributions - Phoronix
tech_news.description: One week after the Copy Fail vulnerability, a new Linux local privilege escalation bug has been made public

tech_news.title: Path of Exile 2 aims for a full 1.0 release this year, but not all of the promised character classes will make it - Eurogamer.net
tech_news.description: It's nearly the end of the early access road for Path of Exile 2. We ask the director about launching this year and which features will, and won't, make it.

tech_news.title: With GTA 6 Due Out in November, Rockstar Teases 'Exciting New Update' for GTA Online This Summer - IGN
tech_news.description: In a blog post, Rockstar Games teased that an "exciting" new GTA Online update will be released this summer, sparking speculation about what it could involve given GTA 6 is set to launch in November.

tech_news.title: New Yakuza Prequel Game Uses The Likeness Of An Actor Who Died 12 Years Ago - Kotaku
tech_news.description: Bunta Sugawara, whose likeness is used in the upcoming prequel game Stranger than Heaven, died in 2014

tech_news.title: You Can Disable Gemini in Chrome if It’s Freaking You Out - WIRED
tech_news.description: Chrome users were caught off guard by a 4-GB Google AI model baked into Chrome, sparking privacy concerns. The good news: You can easily uninstall it. The bad? You might not want to.
